summary: Live PR inventory shard has no shared canonical. Close, merge, fix, and raise-PR paths are disabled by the job/preflight permissions, so the open non-security PRs are retained for normal maintainer or author follow-up instead of being closed or merged. Proxy error-handler PR refs with security-sensitive routing signals are quarantined to central security handling without blocking the unrelated PR inventory classifications.

actions.reason: Focused Telegram config change should remain open for maintainer review; this inventory job cannot merge or repair it.
Technical correctness and relationship to the remaining thinkingLevel follow-up require maintainer judgment; no close/merge/fix action is allowed in this job.
The PR is a focused capability/docs change tied to an open issue and needs maintainer review; closure and merge are disabled.
Active author follow-up and unresolved review findings make this a maintainer/author decision, not an inventory closeout.
Security-sensitive target #88052 must be routed to central OpenClaw security handling; routing is scoped to this exact PR ref.
Broad docs correctness judgment is required; no low-signal or close action is permitted in this inventory job.
Focused CLI maintainability fix has a failing check and needs maintainer technical review; merge/fix are disabled.
Active author follow-up and unresolved review issues block any close/merge classification beyond maintainer review.
User-facing CLI feature needs maintainer product and technical review; job cannot merge or repair it.
P1 focused runtime/config fix is not closable in this inventory shard and needs maintainer review.
Security-sensitive linked ref must be quarantined to central OpenClaw security handling without poisoning unrelated PR classifications.
